subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! A collective letter from you was received and brought joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء نامه جمعی از شما وصول یافت و سبب حصول سرور گردید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
